irStages.title: Optimised Forward
Optimised Reverse

source:
mutable struct Cell
    v::Float64
end

bump!(c::Cell) = (c.v = c.v * c.v; c.v)
title: In-place mutation
description: bump!(c) = (c.v = c.v * c.v; c.v). The field c.v is squared in place. The forward pass captures the old value; the reverse pass propagates the adjoint through the mutation and then restores c.v.
